SUSTAINED-WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO RESPOND SO TO BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM NEEDS TO SET FORTH FACTS RE STATUTE OF FRAUDS AND GREATER DETAIL RE WHEN, WHO, HOW AND TERMS OF CONTRACT.
